summary: Testing completed for 'Crear Predio' workflow feature. Backend: 18/18 tests PASSED after fixing TypeError bug. Frontend: All UI components verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Fixed TypeError in generate_codigo_homologado() - numero_predio was stored as string but code tried to add int
✓ POST /api/predios-nuevos creates predio with estado_flujo='creado' and assigns gestor_apoyo
✓ GET /api/predios-nuevos lists predios with proper filtering by estado and role-based access
✓ POST /api/predios-nuevos/{id}/accion handles all workflow transitions: enviar_revision, aprobar, devolver, rechazar
✓ GET /api/predios-nuevos/buscar-radicado/{numero} searches petitions by radicado number
✓ PrediosEnProceso.js page shows stats cards, filter dropdown, and predio cards with appropriate action buttons
✓ Predios.js has workflow toggle checkbox that reveals Gestor de Apoyo, Radicado, and Observaciones fields
✓ DashboardLayout.js includes 'Predios en Proceso' link in Conservación section
seed_data_creation: Created test predios during backend testing with TEST_ prefix in propietario names. These are in predios_nuevos collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 'Crear Predio' workflow features verified: 1) POST /api/predios-nuevos creates predio with workflow - PASSED, 2) GET /api/predios-nuevos lists predios with filters - PASSED, 3) POST /api/predios-nuevos/{id}/accion handles all actions (enviar_revision, aprobar, devolver, rechazar) - PASSED, 4) GET /api/predios-nuevos/buscar-radicado/{numero} searches radicados - PASSED, 5) PrediosEnProceso page shows stats and predio cards with action buttons - VERIFIED, 6) Predios.js has workflow toggle that shows Gestor de Apoyo, Radicado, Observaciones fields - VERIFIED. Bug fixed: TypeError in generate_codigo_homologado when numero_predio was string instead of int.

feature_1_create_predio_nuevo.details: POST /api/predios-nuevos creates predio with estado_flujo='creado', assigns gestor_apoyo, creates notification

feature_2_list_predios_nuevos.details: GET /api/predios-nuevos returns list with total count, supports estado and municipio filters

feature_3_workflow_actions.details: POST /api/predios-nuevos/{id}/accion handles enviar_revision, aprobar (moves to main collection), devolver, rechazar

feature_4_buscar_radicado.details: GET /api/predios-nuevos/buscar-radicado/{numero} searches petitions and returns radicado info

feature_5_predios_en_proceso_page.details: PrediosEnProceso.js shows stats cards (Total, Creado, En Digitalización, En Revisión, Aprobado, Devuelto), filter dropdown, predio cards with action buttons based on estado and user role

feature_6_nuevo_predio_workflow_toggle.details: Predios.js has 'Usar flujo de trabajo con Gestor de Apoyo' checkbox that reveals Gestor de Apoyo dropdown, Radicado field, and Observaciones textarea

feature_7_navigation.details: DashboardLayout.js has 'Predios en Proceso' link in Conservación section, App.js has route configured

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: can only concatenate str (not 'int') to str in generate_codigo_homologado()
bug_fixed.root_cause: numero_predio field was stored as string in database but code tried to add integer 1 to it
bug_fixed.fix: Added type checking and conversion: if isinstance(num_predio, str): num_predio = int(num_predio)
